script: echo '=== Lia Lopez ==='; az ad user list --filter "startswith(givenName,'Lia')" --query "[].{id:id, displayName:displayName, upn:userPrincipalName, mail:mail}" -o json 2>&1; echo; echo '=== Surname Lopez ==='; az ad user list --filter "startswith(surname,'Lopez')" --query "[].{id:id, displayName:displayName, upn:userPrincipalName, mail:mail}" -o json 2>&1
